title: Anker’s New Earbuds Offer Superior Call Quality
body: Soundcore, Anker's audio brand, has expanded its market reach with the release of the Liberty 5 Pro and Liberty 5 Pro Max earbuds. These new models feature Anker's latest Thus chip, which boasts enhanced processing power compared to previous Soundcore offerings. The result is praised for offering the best call quality heard by the reviewer so far. With this move into premium territory, Anker aims to attract more high-end consumers in its market segment.
